tracks.meaning: a disagreement or argument between two or more people or groups
armed fighting or battle between opposing forces
a state of psychological tension or emotional struggle between opposing desires or beliefs
a disagreement or dispute that may lead to legal proceedings
a lack of agreement between statements, accounts, or pieces of information
a situation where two computer processes or operations interfere with or hinder each other
a clash between competing interests, priorities, or objectives within an organization or deal
a contraindication where one treatment or medication interferes with the effectiveness or safety of another
a personal disagreement or tension between individuals in casual contexts
